name: Teleoperate Pick and Place Operation
description: CoppeliaSim is running with the pickAndPlaceDemo scene containing a Ragnar parallel robot, conveyors, and objects. Write a Python script using the ZMQ Remote API to interactively control the pick-and-place operation. Steps: 1) Connect via RemoteAPIClient, 2) Explore the scene hierarchy to find the Ragnar robot's controllable joints (Ragnar_T_X, Ragnar_T_Y, Ragnar_T_Z for translation, Ragnar_T_TH for rotation), 3) Start the simulation, 4) Read the positions of objects on the conveyor using sim.getObjectPosition(), 5) Move the Ragnar's end-effector above an object by setting the translation joint targets, 6) Lower the end-effector (Ragnar_T_Z) to grasp the object, 7) Raise and move the object to the palletizer/target area, 8) Monitor the operation by reading positions and checking the simulation visually, 9) Take a screenshot of the completed operation and save to '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/pick_place_done.png'. You will need to iterate: write the script, run it, observe the result via screenshot, and adjust positions/timing as needed.
